hero.bio: Backend-focused engineer who enjoys the puzzles behind the product: clean architecture, reliable APIs, and systems that scale.

about.intro: From a teenager obsessed with how things worked to a backend engineer who lives for the puzzle behind the product.

journey.title: The Spark
journey.description: It started at 16 with pure curiosity and an obsession with tutorials — I needed to know how my favourite websites and games were actually built. That itch to look under the hood quickly turned into a lifelong drive to create digital things from scratch.

journey.title: Learning the Craft
journey.description: By 18 the curiosity had become code. Building my first projects in PHP and C++, I realised the part I loved wasn't the finished screen — it was the puzzle behind it. The logic, the data flow, the architecture. That's where backend development quietly became home.

journey.title: Professional Growth
journey.description: In the working world my skills grew past syntax into the whole lifecycle — planning, risk, code quality, and shipping reliable systems at scale. PHP is my specialty, but I move comfortably across JS/TS, C#, Go and more, gravitating to payments and high-throughput services.

journey.title: Going Deeper
journey.description: Outside the day job I taught myself the systems side of the craft — containerising apps with Docker, orchestrating them on Kubernetes, and splitting monoliths into clean microservices. I went deep on data too: warehouses for analytics and serious database optimisation to keep queries fast and cheap.

journey.title: Always Learning
journey.description: I'm pursuing a Computer Science degree at Université Laval in parallel with my career — a few courses each semester, after hours. It's not about the title; it's about sharpening the fundamentals and staying curious. The 16-year-old chasing tutorials never really left.

roles.title: Senior Software Developer
roles.description: Worked in a microservices environment, maintaining multiple services concurrently. New features required careful, coordinated changes across interconnected services, and close collaboration with cross-functional teams to ship reliably.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented robust APIs and integrated third-party services.
Managed CI/CD pipelines and upheld code quality through reviews and testing.
Developed and optimized payment processing features and microservices.
Integrated third-party payment gateways with security compliance (e.g. PCI-DSS).
Built core payment infrastructure with a focus on scalability and reliability.
Monitored and resolved production issues across payment workflows.

roles.title: Intermediate Software Developer
roles.description: Part of the Payment Services team, building and maintaining high-performance backend services supporting internal platforms and user-facing payment flows.

roles.title: Junior Backend Developer
roles.description: Specialized in backend development of ERP platforms, helping clients digitalize and streamline their daily business operations.
responsibilities: Designed and built custom ERP modules tailored to client needs.
Automated business processes: inventory, invoicing, and reporting.
Conducted code reviews and enforced backend development standards.
Worked closely with clients to gather requirements and provide support.

roles.title: Junior Web Developer
roles.description: Implemented new features and enhancements for Spordle's suite of web services supporting sports organizations and leagues.
responsibilities: Developed front-end and back-end features to improve platform functionality.
Built and maintained RESTful APIs for sports data management.
Collaborated with UI/UX teams to enhance user experience.
Resolved bugs and optimized code for performance.

roles.title: Web Developer Intern
roles.description: Developed and maintained internal and external web applications, implemented new features, and optimized code for performance.

roles.title: Web Developer Intern
roles.description: Supported development and maintenance of internal and external web applications, working with senior developers across front-end and back-end tasks while learning modern tooling and best practices.
responsibilities: Assisted in developing, testing, and debugging responsive web applications.
Collaborated with the design team to implement UI/UX improvements.
Participated in code reviews and agile development workflows.

laval.description: Pursuing a part-time Bachelor's — three courses per semester, studied after work — to deepen my computer-science foundations and keep sharpening my skills. It runs entirely on my own time, so it complements my full-time role rather than competing with it.

clg.description: Built my core engineering foundation: raw coding skills, REST APIs, web CRUD apps and MVC architecture, game development, and server management. Worked across C++, C#, Java, PHP, JavaScript/TypeScript, Oracle, MySQL and SQL Server, plus mobile development — alongside project management in Agile/Scrum (sprints, planning poker).

contact.blurb: Have a project in mind, a role to fill, or just want to talk shop? My inbox is always open — I'll get back to you.
